name: Helm Training
briefing: Welcome to Helm Training. Learn to control the ship's heading and speed, read the minimap, and navigate to waypoints. Other systems are managed automatically — focus on the helm controls.

objectives.hint: Use the heading dial to set target heading to 000. The ship will turn to face North. Watch the compass rose on the minimap.

objectives.text: Set throttle to 50% and begin moving
objectives.hint: Drag the throttle slider to 50%. The ship will accelerate. Watch your velocity readout increase. You can also use the AHEAD button.
Waypoint Alpha is at the northern sector (bearing 000, range ~20k). Adjust heading to point toward it on your minimap, then increase throttle. The waypoint appears as a green marker.
Waypoint Bravo is to the east. Set heading to approximately 090° and maintain speed. Good helmsmanship means smooth course changes — avoid sharp reverses.
Sector origin is at the centre of the map (50,000 / 50,000). Set heading 270° to turn west, then adjust south as needed. Reduce throttle as you approach to stop cleanly.
